knowledge_text:
[run brief]
Use this template when the work needs clear delivery cadence.

[control profile]
- task_archetype: repo_delivery
- packet_size: medium
- evidence_level: standard
- gate_cadence: phase
- repo_binding_policy: disabled

[supervisor profile]
- archetype: delivery_manager
- primary_posture: steady_delivery
- quality_bar: reviewable_increment
- risk_bias: balanced
- manager_notes: Prefer stable weekly delivery.
- done_policy.must_block_on: broken build
- done_policy.can_defer_with_note: minor polish
- review_focus: release readiness, user-visible regression

[sources]
- PRD: Desktop product direction

[review checklist]
- check delivery scope
- check release notes
run_brief: Use this template when the work needs clear delivery cadence.
